arts.ttl: Arsenal star Declan Rice pelted by missiles before riot police forced to intervene
arts.sum: Arsenal midfielder Declan Rice opened the scoring after just 104 seconds at the Emirates, but was targeted by Dinamo Zagreb supporters as he took a corner

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals ANOTHER injury as key Arsenal star pulled out of training after suffering knock against Aston Villa
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has confirmed another Arsenal defender is now sidelined with injury after pulling out of training on Tuesday after suffering a knock in the weekend's Premier League draw against Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta confirms yet another Arsenal blow after star pulls up with injury issue
arts.sum: Arsenal have suffered a fresh injury blow, with William Saliba, Riccardo Calafiori, Bukayo Saka, Ben White, Takehiro Tomiyasu, Gabriel Jesus and Ethan Nwaneri all already sidelined

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Declan Rice targeted by objects thrown from Dinamo Zagreb fans - after midfielder gave the Gunners a Champions League lead
arts.sum: The midfielder was targeted by Dinamo Zagreb supporters as he attempted to take corners near the travelling fans during the first half of the Champions League match at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Report: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ stance made clear on Arsenal target Cunha
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are not willing to sell Matheus Cunha this winter window despite extensive interest from clubs, according to reports. The Midlands outfit are unfazed by the myriad of interest in the Brazilian and are not prepared to listen to offers for their star player. That’s according to Sky Sports reporter Danyal Khan who wrote […] The post Report: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ stance made clear on Arsenal target Cunha appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta makes brave squad decision in Arsenal transfer message to Josh Kroenke
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has left ONE space free in his Champions League squad to face Dinamo Zagreb tonight - hinting that the Gunners need to sign players before the end of the month. With Arsenal yet to make a single signing in the January transfer window and the squad looking threadbare with injuries hampering the camp, Arteta has decided to leave one space empty on the bench against Dinamo.

arts.ttl: When is Champions League knockout stages as Arsenal to learn next fixture dates
arts.sum: Liverpool are the only team in the Champions League to progress to the group stage with a flawless win record as they comfortably lead the 32-club table. As for the draw for the Champions League knockout stage, there's both good and bad news for Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Myles Lewis-Skelly absence from Arsenal's Champions League clash with Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta explains the reason for Myles Lewis-Skelly's absence from the Gunners' squad to face Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: BREAKING - Mikel Arteta confirms new Arsenal injury blow after positive double return - football.london
arts.sum: Speaking to reporters ahead of the Champions League clash, Arteta was asked to provide an update on William Saliba, who appeared to suffer a hamstring injury towards the end of the North London Derby. The duo were spotted in training at London Colney on Tuesday ahead of Arsenal's clash against Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Benjamin Sesko sends message to Arsenal as five-word update on January transfer offered
arts.sum: Benjamin Sesko has emerged as a top target for Arsenal, with Gunners' chiefs having sanctioned a big-money move for the RB Leipzig star in this month's transfer window
